action.reasoning: Observation: Starting first iteration with no prior workspace. Analysis: Must create all code from scratch for a simple CNN baseline (residual blocks) to quickly validate the full pipeline (data loading, normalization, training pairs with stride, weighted val RMSE for Z500, predict script). Using 3 epochs, stride=6 on train for speed, will measure iteration time and get initial score. Decision: Train a small model (~1M params), save best.pt based on val, submit eval immediately after.
